**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

VEM Motors (China) Co., Ltd. is a major Sino-foreign joint venture and a key manufacturing node for the German VEM Group, a globally recognized manufacturer of electric motors. While its USCC (91310000) indicates an original registration in Shanghai (a common entry point for foreign capital), its massive physical manufacturing base is firmly established in Xinwu District, Wuxi (Jiangsu Province). With a substantial paid-in capital of 30 Million Euros and 334 insured employees, it represents a heavy-asset, high-tier production facility. VEM China focuses on the manufacturing, R&D, and global export of advanced electric motors, generators, and control systems, serving heavy industries globally.
